## edu-cli exam-node remove-chapter

Remove a chapter from an exam node (从考试节点移除章节)

```
edu-cli exam-node remove-chapter [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --chapter-id uint     Chapter ID (required)
      --exam-node-id uint   Exam node ID (required)
  -h, --help                help for remove-chapter
```

* [edu-cli exam-node](edu-cli_exam-node.md)	 - Manage syllabus exam nodes (考试节点管理)
